examples: There are three main types of symbiotic relationships: parasitism, commensalism, and mutualism.
These are not single individual plants; each one is a symbiotic combination of an alga and a fungus.
A symbiotic relationship is an interaction between two or more species in which one species lives in or on another species.
The Dragon Mart is evidence of the symbiotic relationship between state and entrepreneurial capitalism.
The closer ties spotlight the symbiotic business needs of Twitter and the television industry.
